projects.title: Job Radar
projects.description: Originally a personal tool to filter my own job search, rebuilt into a multi-tenant SaaS where anyone can sign in and get a job feed scored against their skills and preferences. Scrapes 100+ companies across 9 different ATS platforms (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, etc.), runs a three-stage filtering pipeline (regex gates → per-user Gemini AI evaluation) before scoring, and caches personalized results per user

projects.title: ECHO FM
projects.description: A fully autonomous, full-stack news commentary pipeline. It uses advanced neural models to ingest global news, analyze historical patterns, and broadcast sarcastic, witty audio-visual transmissions to the digital grid.

projects.title: Trackstube
projects.description: Music streaming app with ad-free YouTube integration and social sharing features using GraphQL and Apollo Client.

projects.title: Shopping Cart
projects.description: E-commerce shopping cart application with robust state management using Redux Toolkit and TypeScript for type safety.

projects.title: Yelp Camp
projects.description: Full-stack campground review platform with authentication, authorization, image upload, cluster mapping, and comprehensive security features.
